raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.5", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.5": 5,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 4,
    "RX.5": 4
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.5": "The agent proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, addressing the inverted ordering and suggesting a logical flow from problem to results.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags one missing citation (Aliannejadi et al., Zamani et al.) but does not audit every load-bearing citation or provide bibliographic precision for all key works.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for the characterization of prior unsupervised facet work and the claim about MRR variance, but does not mark confidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) without any drift.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free but suggests a minor regression in the generalization claim on MIMICS-Click, which needs more specificity to avoid being read as cherry-picking.",
    "RX.5": "The agent traces major rewrites and provides sources for specific claims (e.g., LM sampling), but does not annotate every non-cosmetic change."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.5": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.8,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.5: The agent proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, addressing the inverted ordering and suggesting a logical flow from problem to results.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags one missing citation (Aliannejadi et al., Zamani et al.) but does not audit every load-bearing citation or provide bibliographic precision for all key works.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for the characterization of prior unsupervised facet work and the claim about MRR variance, but does not mark confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but suggests a minor regression in the generalization claim on MIMICS-Click, which needs more specificity to avoid being read as cherry-picking.
rationale.RX.5: The agent traces major rewrites and provides sources for specific claims (e.g., LM sampling), but does not annotate every non-cosmetic change.
